papers.title_en: RadGuide-S3P-Net: A Radiomics-Guided Self-training Semi-supervised Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Class Pneumonia Subtype Classification
papers.tldr: 针对医疗影像中大规模标注数据稀缺的问题，本研究提出RadGuide-S3P-Net框架，这是一种结合影像组学引导与自训练机制的半监督深度学习网络。该框架旨在利用少量标注数据和大量未标注数据实现肺炎亚型的多分类，通过引入影像组学特征来增强模型的特征提取能力，从而在有限标注样本下提升分类性能。
papers.abstract_en: To reduce the dependency on large-scale labeled data in medical imaging, thisstudy proposes RadGuide-S3P-Net, a radiomics-guided self-training semi-supervised neural network for pneumonia subtype classification. The core idea of …

papers.title_en: Multiparametric MRI-Based Integrated Analysis of Clinical, Radiomics, Deep Learning, and Machine Learning for Predicting Tumor Proliferation and Prognosis in …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在利用多参数MRI影像，通过整合临床信息、影像组学、深度学习与机器学习技术，构建一种综合预测模型。该模型旨在精准评估肿瘤细胞的增殖状态及患者的预后情况。研究结果表明，这种多维度集成分析方法显著提升了预测性能，为临床制定个性化治疗方案和预后评估提供了重要的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Rationale and Objectives This study aimed to develop and validate a predictivemodel integrating clinical, radiomics, deep learning (DL), and machine learning (ML)from multiparametric magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) for predicting tumor cell …

papers.title_en: Integrated Radiomics Model Combining Diffusion Kurtosis Imaging and Dynamic Contrast‐Enhanced MRI for Predicting TERT Promoter Mutation Status in Gliomas
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在探讨结合扩散峰度成像（DKI）和动态对比增强磁共振成像（DCE-MRI）的影像组学模型在术前预测胶质瘤TERT启动子突变状态中的价值。通过整合两种先进的MRI技术，研究开发并验证了一个多参数影像组学模型，为胶质瘤的精准诊断和个体化治疗提供了非侵入性的评估手段。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose The purpose of this study is to investigate the value of a radiomics modelbased on diffusion kurtosis imaging (DKI) and dynamic contrast‐enhanced magneticresonance imaging (DCE‐MRI) for preoperative prediction of telomerase reverse …

papers.title_en: Efficient Deep Ladle-Net for fast universal 3D lesion segmentation on chest–abdomen–pelvis computed tomography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部-腹部-盆腔CT影像中通用病灶分割的复杂性，提出了一种名为Efficient Deep Ladle-Net（Ladle-Net）的高效深度学习模型。该模型旨在实现快速且准确的三维病灶分割，以支持癌症患者随访中肿瘤大小的精确评估。Ladle-Net通过优化网络结构，在保证分割精度的同时显著提升了处理速度，为临床评估治疗效果提供了有力的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate evaluation of tumor size on follow-up computed tomography (CT) scans iscritical for assessing treatment efficacy in cancer patients. However, universal lesionsegmentation of CT remains a significant challenge due to the complexity and …

papers.title_en: Tumor morphology on CT radiomics is largely driven by the local anatomical environment, not the primary tumor type
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了CT影像组学特征的决定因素，旨在区分肿瘤谱系与解剖环境对影像形态的影响。通过量化分析发现，肿瘤在CT影像上的表现更多地取决于其生长的器官环境，而非其原发类型。这一发现揭示了环境因素在影像组学中的主导作用，提醒研究者在利用影像组学进行无创肿瘤分析时，需重新评估影像特征与肿瘤生物学本质之间的关联。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Radiogenomics promises noninvasive tumor profiling; however, the extentto which imaging morphology reflects tumor lineage versus host-organ milieuremains unclear. This study aimed to quantify the relative influence of tumor type and …

papers.title_en: Prognostic value of plaque burden on computed tomography angiography in patients with symptomatic carotid artery disease
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了症状性颈动脉疾病患者中，通过计算机断层扫描血管造影（CTA）评估的斑块负荷对预测缺血性卒中复发的预后价值。虽然MRI斑块负荷已被证实具有预测作用，但考虑到CT在急性卒中诊断中的普及性，本研究验证了CTA作为评估工具的有效性，为临床风险分层提供了重要依据。
papers.abstract_en: Introduction Patients with symptomatic carotid stenosis are at increased risk forrecurrent ischaemic stroke. Plaque burden on MRI has been shown to independentlypredict (recurrent) ischaemic stroke. However, CT is usually preferred in acute stroke …

papers.title_en: Multimodal foundation model for 3D genito-pelvic structure segmentation in image-guided radiotherapy
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射治疗中MRI和CT图像的生殖盆腔结构分割挑战，开发了一种多模态基础模型。该模型旨在解决现有深度学习方法在处理复杂解剖结构和跨模态数据时的局限性。通过在大规模3D医学影像数据集上进行预训练，该模型实现了对盆腔器官的高精度自动分割，显著提升了放疗规划和手术导航的效率与准确性，为临床影像引导治疗提供了强有力的技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning-based segmentation of genito-pelvic structures in MRI and CT iscrucial for applications such as radiation therapy, surgical planning, and diseasediagnosis. However, existing segmentation models often struggle with …

papers.title_en: Cross-sample Consistency Learning for Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医疗影像分割中人工标注成本高昂的问题，本文提出了一种跨样本一致性学习方法。该方法通过深入挖掘有标签和无标签数据之间的关联性，旨在生成更可靠的监督信号。研究的主要贡献在于引入了跨样本的特征一致性约束，有效提升了模型在有限标注数据下的泛化能力，为半监督医学图像分割提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has received more attention in medical imagesegmentation as it helps alleviate the heavy labeling burden. However, effectivelyexploiting the relationship between labeled and unlabeled data to generate reliable …

papers.title_en: MIMIC-CXR-Ext-ILS: Lesion Segmentation Masks and Instruction-Answer Pairs for Chest X-rays}}
papers.tldr: 本研究推出了MIMIC-CXR-Ext-ILS数据集，旨在解决胸部X射线（CXR）病灶分割模型中目标标签少及依赖复杂专家级文本输入的问题。该数据集提供了丰富的病灶分割掩码和指令-回答对，支持通过自然语言指令进行病灶分割，显著提升了模型在临床实践中的易用性和适用范围。
papers.abstract_en: The applicability of current lesion segmentation models for chest X-rays (CXRs) hasbeen limited both by a small number of target labels and the reliance on complex,expert-level text inputs, creating a barrier to practical use. To address these …

papers.title_en: TumorCLIP: Lightweight Vision-Language Fusion for Explainable MRI-Based Brain Tumor Classification
papers.tldr: 针对现有深度学习模型在脑肿瘤MRI分类中存在的解释性不足和超参数敏感性问题，本文提出了TumorCLIP。该模型采用轻量级的视觉-语言融合架构，通过将医学图像特征与文本描述进行跨模态对齐，实现了高效且可解释的肿瘤分类。研究在提升分类性能的同时，增强了模型在临床决策中的透明度，为医学影像分析提供了一种稳健且轻量化的新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate classification of brain tumors from MRI is critical for guiding clinical decision-making; however, existing deep learning models are often hindered by limitedinterpretability and pronounced sensitivity to hyperparameter selection, which …

papers.title_en: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）后训练阶段（结合SFT和RL）配置困难的问题，提出了一种自动化配置框架。由于配置空间高维且异构，且各阶段耦合严重，在有限计算预算下手动调优极具挑战。该方法通过自动化手段优化流水线参数，显著提升了模型性能并降低了人工调优成本，为复杂训练流程提供了系统化优化方案。
papers.abstract_en: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcementlearning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configurationspace is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and …

papers.title_en: ACPO: Counteracting Likelihood Displacement in Vision-Language Alignment with Asymmetric Constraints
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大视觉语言模型（LVLM）在直接偏好优化（DPO）中存在的“似然偏移”问题，即模型在优化过程中可能同时降低选择项和拒绝项的生成概率，从而影响对齐效果。为此，作者提出了ACPO（非对称约束偏好优化）方法，通过引入非对称约束机制来平衡偏好对的似然分布。实验证明，ACPO能有效提升模型在视觉问答和幻觉缓解等任务上的性能，为视觉语言对齐提供了更稳健的优化方案。
papers.abstract_en: While Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has become the de facto approach foraligning Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), it suffers from LikelihoodDisplacement, where the probability of both chosen and rejected responses …

papers.title_en: ForestPrune: High-ratio Visual Token Compression for Video Multimodal Large Language Models via Spatial-Temporal Forest Modeling
papers.tldr: 针对视频多模态大语言模型在处理长视频时面临的巨大计算和内存开销，本文提出了ForestPrune。该方法通过创新的时空森林建模技术，对视频视觉Token进行高效剪枝。ForestPrune能够在保持模型理解能力的同时实现极高的压缩比，有效解决了现有方法在视频任务中压缩效率与信息保留之间的矛盾，显著提升了长视频处理的效率。
papers.abstract_en: Due to the great saving of computation and memory overhead, token compressionhas become a research hot-spot for MLLMs and achieved remarkable progress inimage-language tasks. However, for the video, existing methods still fall short of high …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中视觉标记减少导致的性能瓶颈，本文提出了 VISOR。该方法通过稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互，在不损失关键信息的前提下提升模型效率。VISOR 允许模型根据需求动态访问视觉特征，从而在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算开销，为高效多模态学习提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度神经语言模型中语言表示学习难以追踪的长期挑战，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法旨在解决在复杂模型中定位特定语言表示的难题，通过引入对抗性扰动机制来探测模型内部的特征编码。研究的主要贡献在于提供了一种低成本、高效率的工具，为理解和评估语言模型的内部表示机制提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在图形用户界面（GUI）定位任务中应用离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLM）的潜力。长期以来，自回归模型在多模态理解和GUI定位中占据主导地位，但本文提出并验证了DVLM在处理GUI交互中的优势。通过将扩散模型引入GUI Agent开发，研究展示了其在精准定位和复杂界面理解上的卓越性能，为构建更高效的自动化GUI代理提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在监督微调过程中感知能力提升却导致推理性能下降的“推理税”问题，提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度的参与度，旨在微调过程中平衡感知与推理能力。实验证明，该方法能有效缓解推理性能的退化，为优化VLM的后训练过程提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思时难以自动评估提案质量（如创新性和合理性）的问题，提出了一种学习预测与未来趋势对齐的科研提案的方法。该方法通过利用LLM预测未来研究方向，解决了大规模人工评估的局限性。研究证明，这种基于未来对齐的预测模型能更有效地衡量提案价值，为自动化科研评估和创意生成提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: Memory Dial: A Training Framework for Controllable Memorization in Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对语言模型记忆机制难以隔离和控制的挑战，本文提出 Memory Dial 训练框架。该框架改变了以往仅在训练后进行被动检测的局限，通过在训练阶段引入可控机制，实现了对模型记忆行为的主动管理与隔离。这一贡献为解释模型预测提供了新工具，并增强了对模型存储特定信息能力的干预与控制。
papers.abstract_en: Memorization in language models is widely studied but remains difficult to isolateand control. Understanding when and what models memorize is essential forexplaining their predictions, yet existing approaches are post-hoc: they can detect …

papers.title_en: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散多模态大语言模型（dLLMs）在视觉定位推理中的不足，提出了“Thinking Diffusion”框架。该方法通过在扩散去噪过程中引入惩罚与引导机制，优化了模型对视觉信息的理解与逻辑推理能力。相比于传统的自回归模型，该方案在保持扩散模型生成优势的同时，显著提升了视觉任务的准确性，为多模态推理提供了有效的新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives toautoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodaltasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models …
